memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
history
The Bulmer family were a noble family of Norman England, resident in Yorkshire. The family takes their name from Bulmer, North Yorkshire. The name Bulmer comes from English "Bull mere", a lake …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve de Bulmer於1274年7月8日出生在英國英格蘭克利夫蘭維爾頓時，她的父親John de Bulmer IV30歲，母親Theophania de Morewick20歲。她於1292年之前與Henry FitzHugh結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1303年1月25日在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve de Bulmer于1274年7月8日出生在英国英格兰克利夫蘭維爾頓时，她的父亲John de Bulmer IV30岁，母亲Theophania de Morewick20岁。她于1292年之前与Henry FitzHugh结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1303年1月25日在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eve de Bulmer was born on 8 July 1274, in Wilton, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Bulmer IV, was 30 and her mother, Theophania de Morewick, was 20. She married Henry FitzHugh before 1292. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 January 1303, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve de Bulmer est née le 8 juillet 1274, à Wilton, Cleveland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Bulmer IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Theophania de Morewick, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Henry FitzHugh avant 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1303, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve de Bulmer am 8. Juli 1274 in Wilton, Cleveland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bulmer IV 30 und ihre Mutter Theophania de Morewick 20. Sie hat vor 1292 Henry FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1303 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Bulmer è nata il il 8 luglio 1274 nel Wilton, Cleveland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Bulmer IV, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Theophania de Morewick, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Henry FitzHugh prima del 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1303, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve de Bulmerが1274年7月8日にイギリスイギリスクレベランドウィルトンで生まれた時，父John de Bulmer IVは30歳，母Theophania de Morewickは20歳であった。1292年以前にHenry FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1303年1月25日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve de Bulmer(이)가 1274년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 클레벨랜드 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bulmer IV(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Theophania de Morewick(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1292년 이전 Henry FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 July 1274–25 January 1303: 8 de julho de 1274–25 de janeiro de 1303
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Bulmer nasceu em 8 de julho de 1274, em Wilton, Cleveland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Bulmer IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Theophania de Morewick, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry FitzHugh antes 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1303, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve de Bulmer родилась 8 июля 1274 г. в местности уилтон, кливеланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Bulmer IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Theophania de Morewick, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry FitzHugh перед 1292 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 января 1303 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.8 July 1274–25 January 1303: 8 de julio de 1274–25 de enero de 1303
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eve de Bulmer nació el 8 de julio de 1274, en Wilton, Cleveland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Bulmer IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Theophania de Morewick, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Henry FitzHugh antes de 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1303, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
